name: Fruit-Cheese Kabobs with Ginger Dip
recipeIngredient: -30 pineapple chunks (about 3/4 inch wide), or 1 can (8 1/4 oz) sliced pineapple in syrup, drained and each slice cut into eighths
-26 mandarin orange segments, or 1 can (11 oz) mandarin-orange segments, drained
-24 cheese cubes (about 3/4 inch thick), about 8 oz total
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Ginger Dip.
2. Alternate pieces of fruit and cheese on plastic or wooden picks.
3. Serve with the prepared Ginger Dip.
- Approximately 40 appetizers are made.
- Each serving contains about 65 calories.
